---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve structural integrity.
title: "[BUG]: "
labels: bug, high-priority
---

## 🛑 The Breakage

Describe where the Zero-Gap Architecture or Theme Engine is failing.

## 💻 Environment Metadata

- **Browser (Name & Version):** [e.g., Chrome 124]
- **Tailwind Version:** [e.g., v3.4.1]
- **Theme Active:** [Light / Obsidian]

## 🎯 Specificity & Layout Checks

- [ ] Is there a horizontal scrollbar visible? (Horizontal Bleed)
- [ ] Does the color persist when switching to Obsidian mode?
- [ ] Are you seeing any 'gap' properties in the inspector?

## 📸 Proof

(Attach screenshots showing the layout break or contrast failure)
